payload.answer: The summary contains architectural decisions/project state (Brain DB as source of truth, Cognee as rebuildable semantic projection, Slack as strict memory intake agent) plus open questions about possibly adding Telegram later and model cost/performance.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
